title: AwardedContract
description: A construction contract that DDC has awarded to a firm — the vendor-award record. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Directory Of Awarded Construction Contracts' dataset (j7gw-gcxi, 4 columns): description, selected firm, PIN, and dollar value. Keyed on PIN. A public read of existing contracts also lives on Checkbook NYC (Comptroller); solicitations and award notices are published in the City Record.

clientAgency.description: Sponsoring agency, where the contract ties back to a client-agency project.
